summary: Multiple vehicles are traveling on a multi-lane road during daylight hours. A sedan is positioned ahead of the ego-vehicle, while a truck is seen moving alongside it. Other cars are present on both sides of the road. The vehicles maintain moderate speeds and distances from each other.
